context_window.raw_content: Me: I much rather prefer blogs. Them: Okay? Me: Because. We can add blocks to our website. And so when someone comes to a website, gives access, credibility, like the same thing we have on a website in one blog. Also, if we start a newsletter, like a substack newsletter, where we write a blog. For next month's email update. Instead of writing this long email, we can just put a sub stack link. And we can add some pictures to us participating and some other pictures as well. So that's why I prefer to start. And also, I think fundamentally, we like. We are an academic company. We like putting information out there. And I think on LinkedIn it just gets lost in the noise. And I would rather us write like long format articles. On project management, Agilent, AI and Agile.
